name: hk_3_11
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-10 across ROADSIDE stations compute and store: mean_no2_am (07:00-09:00), mean_no2_lunch (12:00-14:00), mean_no2_pm (18:00-20:00) (float) and highest_no2_window ('AM','LUNCH' or 'PM', str).

turns.query: Compare NO2 levels during morning rush (7-9 AM), lunch time (12-2 PM), and evening rush (6-8 PM) at roadside monitoring stations on 2025-06-10.
